cement_equivalent.provenance_note: Phase 1 reference scenario v0.2 — Inherited cement-equivalent output anchor from the Phase 1 calibration build.

commercial_building_services.provenance_note: Australian Energy Update 2025 Table 5 / Table 11 — Aligned to 2023–24 commercial final energy use as the incumbent service-demand anchor.

cropping_horticulture_output_bundle.provenance_note: Phase 1 reference scenario v0.2 — Inherited coarse agricultural output-bundle anchor from the Phase 1 calibration build.

crude_steel.provenance_note: Phase 1 reference scenario v0.2 — Inherited crude steel output anchor from the Phase 1 calibration build.

engineered_removals.provenance_note: Migrated family default — Migrated from the Phase 1 package without changing anchor semantics.

freight_road_transport.provenance_note: BITRE Yearbook 2024 freight chapter — Anchored to 2023–24 road freight task (~249 billion tonne-km).

high_temperature_heat.provenance_note: Phase 1 reference scenario v0.2 — Inherited high-temperature useful-heat anchor from the synthetic Phase 1 calibration build; broad manufacturing proxy.

land_sequestration.provenance_note: Migrated family default — Migrated from the Phase 1 package without changing anchor semantics.

livestock_output_bundle.provenance_note: Phase 1 reference scenario v0.2 — Inherited coarse agricultural output-bundle anchor from the Phase 1 calibration build.

low_temperature_heat.provenance_note: Phase 1 reference scenario v0.2 — Inherited low-temperature useful-heat anchor from the synthetic Phase 1 calibration build; broad manufacturing proxy.

medium_temperature_heat.provenance_note: Phase 1 reference scenario v0.2 — Inherited medium-temperature useful-heat anchor from the synthetic Phase 1 calibration build; broad manufacturing proxy.

passenger_road_transport.provenance_note: BITRE Yearbook 2024 Table 5.1 — Anchored to 2023–24 road passenger task represented by passenger cars plus buses (276.2 + 17.2 = 293.4 billion pkm).

residential_building_services.provenance_note: Australian Energy Update 2025 Table 5 / Table 11 — Aligned to 2023–24 residential final energy use as the incumbent service-demand anchor.

electricity.provenance_note: Derived = official total generation benchmark - explicit modelled end-use electricity. — Residual electricity-supply output required to reach total generation, covering omitted-sector final demand plus losses/own-use.
